payload.answer: mem_new was returned because it is the current memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was not returned because it is marked as superseded, so presenting it as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context identifies Sam by the Goldman association. No additional disambiguating entity identifier was provided.

mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Did not present superseded content as current.
